_comment: Folded-by-default characteristics in the info panel: a lone Archers regiment (drill mode, no opponent) is selected, then walked a short way north-east so the panel's live lines (Speed, Accel) tick. The point under review is the DEFAULT panel state: the static characteristic rows (Attack/Defense, panoply, body mass, weapon/shield/mount) are collapsed behind a '> Characteristics' toggle row, so the visible panel holds only the identity block and the live stats -- markedly shorter than the previous always-expanded sheet. (The expand interaction is a HUD button click, which the scripted-input recorder cannot drive -- it only feeds SelectionManager -- so the expanded state is shown as a still in the PR description instead.) Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
